turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
SELECT
NULL GenelBilgiler,
(CASE WHEN sd.EntryDate IS NULL THEN (Format(sd.ValueDate, N’MMddyy’)) ELSE sd.EntryDate + Format(sd.ValueDate, N’yy’) END) EntryDate,
sd.ValueDate,
ra.BankAccountsId,
ra.SWIFTCode,
ra.AccountNumber,
ra.AccountSuffix,
LEFT(c.CustomerName,100) CustomerName,
f.FecCode,
FORMAT((CONVERT(VARCHAR(50),(CASE WHEN DebitCreditCode IN (‘D’,‘RC’) THEN sd.Amount ELSE 0 END) )),‘N2’,‘tr-tr’) StatementDebit,
(CASE WHEN DebitCreditCode IN (‘C’,‘RD’) THEN sd.Amount ELSE 0 END) StatementCredit,
0.00 AccountingDebit,
0.00 AccountingCredit,
sd.AccountsReference + ’ ’ + sd.InstitutionsReference + ’ ’ + sd.SupplementaryDetails SharedReferanceDetails,
sd.InformationToAccountOwner,
sd.IdentificationCode,
NULL AccSystemDate,
NULL AccUserName,
NULL ResourceName,
NULL BusinessKey
FROM BOA.RCC.BankAccounts ra WITH (NOLOCK)
JOIN BOA.CUS.Customer c WITH (NOLOCK) ON c.Customerid=ra.AccountNumber
JOIN BOA.COR.FEC f WITH (NOLOCK) ON f.FecId=ra.FEC
JOIN BOA.RCC.SwiftDebit sd WITH (NOLOCK) ON sd.BankAccountsId=ra.BankAccountsId AND sd.Status=‘U’
WHERE ra.BankAccountsId = 21–(SELECT BankAccountsId FROM #BankAccounts WHERE Id = @Incrementer) AND f.FecGroup IN (0,1) AND ra.IsActive = 1 . Argument data type varchar is invalid for argument 1 of format function hatasını düzeltip tekrar yazar mısın

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
SELECT
NULL GenelBilgiler,
(CASE WHEN sd.EntryDate IS NULL THEN (CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),sd.ValueDate, 101)) ELSE sd.EntryDate + RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),sd.ValueDate, 101),2) END) EntryDate,
sd.ValueDate,
ra.BankAccountsId,
ra.SWIFTCode,
ra.AccountNumber,
ra.AccountSuffix,
LEFT(c.CustomerName,100) CustomerName,
f.FecCode,
FORMAT((CASE WHEN DebitCreditCode IN ('D','RC') THEN sd.Amount ELSE 0 END ),'N2','tr-tr') StatementDebit,
(CASE WHEN DebitCreditCode IN ('C','RD') THEN sd.Amount ELSE 0 END) StatementCredit,
0.00 AccountingDebit,
0.00 AccountingCredit,
sd.AccountsReference + ' ' + sd.InstitutionsReference + ' ' + sd.SupplementaryDetails SharedReferanceDetails,
sd.InformationToAccountOwner,
sd.IdentificationCode,
NULL AccSystemDate,
NULL AccUserName,
NULL ResourceName,
NULL BusinessKey
FROM BOA.RCC.BankAccounts ra WITH (NOLOCK)
JOIN BOA.CUS.Customer c WITH (NOLOCK) ON c.Customerid=ra.AccountNumber
JOIN BOA.COR.FEC f WITH (NOLOCK) ON f.FecId=ra.FEC
JOIN BOA.RCC.SwiftDebit sd WITH (NOLOCK) ON sd.BankAccountsId=ra.BankAccountsId AND sd.Status='U'
WHERE ra.BankAccountsId = 21--(SELECT BankAccountsId FROM #BankAccounts WHERE Id = @Incrementer) 
AND f.FecGroup IN (0,1) AND ra.IsActive = 1

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
SELECT
		NULL GenelBilgiler,
		(CASE  WHEN sd.EntryDate  IS NULL THEN (Format(sd.ValueDate, N'MMddyy')) ELSE sd.EntryDate + Format(sd.ValueDate, N'yy') END) EntryDate,
		sd.ValueDate,
		ra.BankAccountsId,
		ra.SWIFTCode,
		ra.AccountNumber,
		ra.AccountSuffix,
		LEFT(c.CustomerName,100) CustomerName,
		f.FecCode,
		FORMAT((CAST((CASE WHEN DebitCreditCode IN ('D','RC') THEN sd.Amount ELSE 0 END) AS VARCHAR(20) )),'N2','tr-tr') StatementDebit,
		(CASE WHEN DebitCreditCode IN ('C','RD') THEN sd.Amount ELSE 0 END) StatementCredit,
		0.00 AccountingDebit,
		0.00 AccountingCredit,
		sd.AccountsReference + ' ' + sd.InstitutionsReference + ' ' + sd.SupplementaryDetails SharedReferanceDetails,	
		sd.InformationToAccountOwner,
		sd.IdentificationCode,
		NULL AccSystemDate,
		NULL AccUserName,
		NULL ResourceName,
		NULL BusinessKey
	FROM BOA.RCC.BankAccounts ra WITH (NOLOCK)
	JOIN BOA.CUS.Customer c WITH (NOLOCK) ON c.Customerid=ra.AccountNumber
	JOIN BOA.COR.FEC f WITH (NOLOCK) ON f.FecId=ra.FEC
	JOIN BOA.RCC.SwiftDebit sd WITH (NOLOCK) ON sd.BankAccountsId=ra.BankAccountsId AND sd.Status='U'
	WHERE ra.BankAccountsId = 21 bu sp deki statementDebit kolonunu  sonucu ‘999G999G999D99’ formatında verecek şekilde sp yi düzenle

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
SELECT
		NULL GenelBilgiler,
		(CASE  WHEN sd.EntryDate  IS NULL THEN (Format(sd.ValueDate, N'MMddyy')) ELSE sd.EntryDate + Format(sd.ValueDate, N'yy') END) EntryDate,
		sd.ValueDate,
		ra.BankAccountsId,
		ra.SWIFTCode,
		ra.AccountNumber,
		ra.AccountSuffix,
		LEFT(c.CustomerName,100) CustomerName,
		f.FecCode,
		REPLACE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), CAST(CAST((CASE WHEN DebitCreditCode IN ('D','RC') THEN sd.Amount ELSE 0 END) AS MONEY),0),1),'.' , 'G') AS StatementDebit,
		(CASE WHEN DebitCreditCode IN ('C','RD') THEN sd.Amount ELSE 0 END) StatementCredit,
		0.00 AccountingDebit,
		0.00 AccountingCredit,
		sd.AccountsReference + ' ' + sd.InstitutionsReference + ' ' + sd.SupplementaryDetails SharedReferanceDetails,	
		sd.InformationToAccountOwner,
		sd.IdentificationCode,
		NULL AccSystemDate,
		NULL AccUserName,
		NULL ResourceName,
		NULL BusinessKey
	FROM BOA.RCC.BankAccounts ra WITH (NOLOCK)
	JOIN BOA.CUS.Customer c WITH (NOLOCK) ON c.Customerid=ra.AccountNumber
	JOIN BOA.COR.FEC f WITH (NOLOCK) ON f.FecId=ra.FEC
	JOIN BOA.RCC.SwiftDebit sd WITH (NOLOCK) ON sd.BankAccountsId=ra.BankAccountsId AND sd.Status='U'
	WHERE ra.BankAccountsId = 21
